title: World Sauna Forum
venue: Paviljonki, Sataman Viilu and sauna venues
intro: Global sauna business, culture and wellness gathering.
sourceNote: Verified: official World Sauna Forum lists 9-11 June 2026 in Jyväskylä.

title: Sauna Region Week
venue: Public saunas, lakeside sites and partner venues
intro: Regional sauna week around central Finland with pop-ups, tours and local sauna culture.
sourceNote: Dates are aligned to the World Sauna Forum week; exact public programme can change.

title: International Sauna Congress
venue: Oslo City Hall and Norwegian sauna venues
intro: The international congress for sauna societies, builders and bathing-culture specialists.
sourceNote: Verified: official ISC26 listings show 24-26 September 2026 in Oslo.

title: Aufguss WM
intro: World championship for performance Aufguss: heat, scent, choreography and storytelling.
sourceNote: Verified: Aufguss WM lists 14-20 September 2026 at Satama Sauna Resort & Spa, Germany.

title: Modern Classic Cup
intro: International Aufguss competition focused on a modern classic format.
sourceNote: Verified: Aufguss WM lists 1-4 October 2026 at Farris Bad, Norway.

title: UK Aufguss Championships
intro: UK qualifier and showcase for sauna masters and Aufguss performance.
sourceNote: Verified: British Sauna Society announced 20-22 April 2026 at Galgorm Resort.

title: European Sauna Marathon
intro: Teams move between saunas in an orienteering-style winter sauna race.
sourceNote: Guinness notes Otepää European Sauna Marathon as the longest-running annual sauna marathon, first held in 2007.

title: interbad Sauna Forum
intro: Trade-fair meeting point for pool, spa, wellness and sauna operators.
sourceNote: Trade fair dates can shift by edition; keep official interbad listing as source of truth.

title: World Sauna Day
venue: Local saunas and community bathing sites
intro: A global participation day for sauna bathing, sauna stories and community sessions.
sourceNote: Exact local programmes vary; use organizer listings before travel.

title: Helsinki Sauna Day
venue: Public and private saunas around Helsinki
intro: City sauna day where unusual, private or pop-up saunas can open to visitors.
sourceNote: Next edition details are TBC; Helsinki remains the canonical city context.

title: Tampere Sauna Week
venue: Tampere public saunas and lakeside venues
intro: A sauna capital week for public bathing, lake dips and local sauna tourism.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 programme is TBC.

title: Tuira Sauna Festival
venue: Tuira and Oulu waterfront sauna sites
intro: Northern Finland sauna festival built around heat, cold water and community bathing.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 programme is TBC.

title: Sauna Herbal Cup
intro: Competition and knowledge event around whisking, herbs, aroma and sauna rituals.
sourceNote: Host and final dates are TBC for this page.

title: Nordic Sauna Summit
intro: Regional summit idea for public sauna operators, designers and bathing-culture communities.
sourceNote: Edition details are TBC; use this as a planning placeholder.

title: British Sauna Week
intro: UK-wide sauna culture week for community saunas, beach saunas and bathhouse operators.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 programme is TBC.

title: Japan Sauna Fair
intro: Japanese sauna event for sento, sauna goods, cold plunge culture and wellness brands.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 dates are TBC.

title: Sauna & Wellness Expo Japan
intro: Trade-focused sauna and wellness expo for equipment, operators and hospitality.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 dates are TBC.

title: Australia Sauna & Cold Plunge Festival
intro: Australian festival concept around mobile saunas, cold plunges and recovery culture.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 dates are TBC.

title: North American Sauna Summit
intro: North American meeting point for public sauna, backyard builders and bathhouse operators.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 dates are TBC.

title: Canadian Sauna Culture Weekend
venue: Urban sauna and cold-plunge venues TBC
intro: Winter weekend for Canadian sauna, cold exposure and Nordic-style social wellness.
sourceNote: Exact 2026 dates are TBC.
